from source import powerset

def test_powerset_all_subsets_present():
    result = powerset([1, 2])
    assert len(result) == 4, f"Expected 4 subsets for [1, 2], got {len(result)}: {result}"
    expected = [[], [2], [1], [1, 2]]
    assert sorted(result) == sorted(expected), f"Subset content mismatch. Expected {expected}, got {result}"
